package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for root_main_go_in_layered_service_repo: Layered service repos that keep the primary binary at repository-root `main.go` instead of `cmd/<name>/main.go`.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule148NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule148NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule148NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario148Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule148NegativeService, input Rule148NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
